# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue if one exists. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] E2E affected? `pnpm e2e` passes
- [ ] Adapter behavior changed? Contract tests and fixtures updated
- [ ] User-facing behavior changed? Docs/README updated
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this should be released
